title: Berglander Stainless Steel Ice Scoop 6 OZ, Multipurpose Scooper for Kitchen, Bar, Party, Wedding, Pet, Animal, Dog Food, Beach Shovel (Silver)
features: STURDY & DURABLE - Sturdy constructed of high quality stainless steel, sturdy and durable for lifetime use. Made of healthy stainless steel, lead free and rust resistant.

Versatile: the Berglander food scoop is more than just a tool for scooping ice cream and flour, this robust stainless steel scoop is also perfect for candy, nuts, beans, popcorn, cereal displays, and pet food for pets such as cats, birds, and dogs.
High-quality surface finish: this spoon is crafted by a human hand-polished surface to be a bright mirror and a beautiful shape.
Ergonomic design: ergonomic design makes the spoon convincing to use and comfortable to hold.
EASY TO STORE AND CLEAN - This shovel is made with a hole and easy to store by hanging it with hooks. It is also dishwasher safe for safe cleaning.
description: Berglander Stainless Steel Ice Scoop 6 OZ, Metal Ice Scoop for Ice Maker, Versatile for Candy Kitchen Bar Party Wedding Pet Pet Dog Food Beach Scoop (Silver)
